proficiencyLevels.name: None/Low
proficiencyLevels.description: Unable to perform; little to no experience

proficiencyLevels.name: Basic
proficiencyLevels.description: Limited in ability or knowledge; Cannot perform for critical tasks; Need significant help from others

proficiencyLevels.name: Intermediate
proficiencyLevels.description: Able to perform at basic level; Has some direct experience; Needs help from time to time

proficiencyLevels.name: Expert
proficiencyLevels.description: Capable and experienced; Able to work independently and need no assistance; Can lead and train others
